name: Trend Reversal Failed Breakdown V1
description: Research-only reversal breakout setup: a liquid stock undercuts its prior 20-day low, reclaims that level and SMA20, and closes strong.

research_summary.warning: Focused Python research found a weak out-of-sample result. This is included in app backtests for monitoring, not promotion.

rules: prior close was at or below prior SMA20

notes: This strategy family is not approved for live trading.
Use app backtests to monitor whether the pattern improves after more data.
